description_short: Analyze risk assessment reports against MITRE ATT&CK stages with control effectiveness scoring.
description_long: Validates attack path narratives in risk assessment documents against MITRE ATT&CK stages. Supports multiple attack types (ransomware, APT, data theft, DDoS, insider threat, web attack) with type-specific required/optional stage mappings. Assesses security control effectiveness, evidence basis, independence violations, and generates confidence scores. Outputs structured JSON or formatted text reports.
author: Event Mill Contributors
